recommendations.title: 4:44 Last Day on Earth
recommendations.overview: A look at how a painter and a successful actor spend their last day together before the world comes to an end.

recommendations.title: The Addiction
recommendations.overview: A vampiric doctoral student tries to follow the philosophy of a nocturnal comrade and control her thirst for blood.

recommendations.title: The Funeral
recommendations.overview: After the funeral of one of their own, a criminal family decides to embark on an emotionally unnerving journey in an attempt to exact bloody revenge.

recommendations.title: Bad Lieutenant
recommendations.overview: While investigating a young nun's rape, a corrupt New York City police detective, with a serious drug and gambling addiction, tries to change his ways and find forgiveness.

recommendations.title: Ms .45
recommendations.overview: After being attacked and raped twice in one day, a timid, mute seamstress becomes a violent agent of revenge for wronged women.

recommendations.title: New Rose Hotel
recommendations.overview: A corporate raider and his henchman use a chanteuse to lure a scientific genius away from his employer and family.

recommendations.title: The Driller Killer
recommendations.overview: An artist slowly goes insane while struggling to pay his bills, work on his paintings, and care for his two female roommates, which leads him taking to the streets of New York after dark and randomly killing derelicts with a power drill.

recommendations.title: King of New York
recommendations.overview: A former drug lord returns from prison determined to wipe out all his competition and distribute the profits of his operations to New York's poor and lower classes in this stylish and ultra violent modern twist on Robin Hood.

recommendations.title: Pasolini
recommendations.overview: We are with Pasolini during the last hours of his life, as he talks with his beloved family and friends, writes, gives a brutally honest interview, shares a meal with Ninetto Davoli, and cruises for the roughest rough trade in his gun-metal gray Alfa

recommendations.title: Zeros and Ones
